name: DatePicker
description: Calendar popover for picking a single date or range.

api.name: DatePicker
api.description: Calendar popover for picking a single date or range.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Picker visual style. Defaults to Calendar.

parameters.name: DateTimeValue
parameters.description: Optional DateTime? binding. When set, takes precedence over Value. Changes fire both ValueChanged (DateOnly?) and DateTimeValueChanged (DateTime?). When ShowTimePicker is enabled the current Time selection is folded into the emitted DateTime; otherwise the time component is midnight.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Date format string. When null (default), the display falls back to the current culture's ShortDatePattern — so a de-DE user sees 15.03.2026 and an en-US user sees 3/15/2026 automatically.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Overrides CurrentCulture for parsing and formatting within this picker. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization.

parameters.name: IsDateDisabled
parameters.description: Custom predicate to disable specific dates (e.g. booked rooms, unavailable slots). Returns true for dates that should not be selectable.

parameters.name: DateClass
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes per day cell (e.g. status backgrounds for booking calendars).

parameters.name: DateTooltip
parameters.description: Per-date tooltip text rendered as the day cell's title attribute (native browser tooltip).

parameters.name: DateBadge
parameters.description: Per-date indicator slot (status dots, count badges, icons) rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell.

parameters.name: Values
parameters.description: The selected days for Multiple. Clicking a day (or Enter/Space on it) toggles it in/out of the set; the popover stays open so several days can be picked in one session. Pair with ValuesChanged for two-way binding.

parameters.name: AllowKeyboardInput
parameters.description: When true (default), the trigger renders as a typeable <input> in the configured Format. On blur / Enter the buffer is parsed via DateOnly.TryParseExact(string, string, IFormatProvider, System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles, out DateOnly) (with a fallback to DateOnly.TryParse(string, IFormatProvider, System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles, out DateOnly)). On success the value commits via ValueChanged; on failure the buffer reverts and OnParseError fires. Set to false to keep the historic button-only trigger (input readonly). Has no effect for Range, Wheel, Inline, or when a custom TriggerContent is supplied.

parameters.name: OnParseError
parameters.description: Fires when keyboard input cannot be parsed against the active Format (or culture short pattern), or parses to a date that is rejected by MinDate/MaxDate/IsDateDisabled. The argument is the offending raw buffer.

parameters.name: Inline
parameters.description: Optional controlled-mode override for the popover open state. When non-null, the consumer holds the source of truth — the picker no longer mutates its internal state and instead raises OpenChanged. Use this when the picker lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active DataAnnotationsValidator) and the popover would otherwise close mid-click during a parameter cascade. When null (default), the picker falls back to its internal open state and behaves exactly as before.

parameters.name: FirstDayOfWeek
parameters.description: Leftmost column day of week. Null means culture default.

parameters.name: ShowWeekNumbers
parameters.description: When true, renders an ISO week-number column.

parameters.name: OpenChanged
parameters.description: Fires whenever the popover would open or close. Pair with Open via @bind-Open for the controlled-mode pattern described above.

parameters.name: FullWidth
parameters.description: When true, the date picker expands to fill its container width — equivalent to FullWidth on a Button. Propagates w-full to the Popover wrapper and PopoverTrigger so the constraint reaches the rendered trigger element through the shrink-wrap chain.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the date-picker trigger on first render. Whichever trigger element is rendered (button / range-button / masked input) receives the focus via its shared id. See Input.AutoFocus for the rationale.

events.name: OnParseError
events.description: Fires when keyboard input cannot be parsed against the active Format (or culture short pattern), or parses to a date that is rejected by MinDate/MaxDate/IsDateDisabled. The argument is the offending raw buffer.

events.name: OpenChanged
events.description: Fires whenever the popover would open or close. Pair with Open via @bind-Open for the controlled-mode pattern described above.

enums.name: DatePickerVariant
enums.description: Visual style of the picker. Calendar renders the existing month-grid Calendar (default). Wheel renders three iOS-style snap-scrolling columns (day / month / year) — designed for mobile / touch UIs.

records.name: DatePickerPreset
records.signature: DatePickerPreset(string Label, DateOnly Date, DateOnly? End = null)
records.description: Quick-select preset. For Single only Date is used; for Range the preset selects Date..End (or a single-day range when End is null).

examples.title: With Label
examples.code:
<Label>Date of birth</Label>
<DatePicker @bind-Value="_date" Placeholder="Pick your date of birth" />

examples.title: Min & Max Date
examples.code:
<DatePicker @bind-Value="_date" MinDate="@_minDate" MaxDate="@_maxDate" Placeholder="Select within range" />

@code {
    private DateOnly? _date;
    private DateOnly _minDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today);
    private DateOnly _maxDate = DateOnly.FromDateTime(DateTime.Today.AddDays(30));
}

parameters.name: IsDateDisabled
parameters.description: Custom predicate to disable specific dates (e.g. booked rooms). Returns true for dates that should not be selectable.

parameters.name: DateClass
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes per day cell — forwarded to inner Calendar.

parameters.name: DateTooltip
parameters.description: Per-date tooltip text rendered as the day cell's title.

parameters.name: DateBadge
parameters.description: Per-date indicator slot rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell.

parameters.name: Format
parameters.description: Date format. When null (default) the inner DatePicker falls back to the effective culture's ShortDatePattern — so a de-DE user sees 15.03.2026 and an en-US user sees 3/15/2026 automatically.

parameters.name: FullWidth
parameters.description: When true, the date range picker expands to fill its container width. Forwarded directly to the inner DatePicker.

mdSummary:
# DatePicker

Calendar popover for picking a single date or range.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/date-picker

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DatePicker | Variant | `DatePickerVariant` | `DatePickerVariant.Calendar` | Picker visual style. Defaults to Calendar. |
| DatePicker | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Required | `bool` | `false` |  |
| DatePicker | Invalid | `bool` | `false` |  |
| DatePicker | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Value | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | DateTimeValue | `DateTime?` | `` | Optional DateTime? binding. When set, takes precedence over Value. Changes fire both ValueChanged (DateOnly?) and DateTimeValueChanged (DateTime?). When ShowTimePicker is enabled the current Time selection is folded into the emitted DateTime; otherwise the time component is midnight. |
| DatePicker | DateTimeValueChanged | `EventCallback<DateTime?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Format | `string?` | `` | Date format string. When null (default), the display falls back to the current culture's ShortDatePattern — so a de-DE user sees 15.03.2026 and an en-US user sees 3/15/2026 automatically. |
| DatePicker | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Overrides CurrentCulture for parsing and formatting within this picker. Leave null to honour ASP.NET request localization. |
| DatePicker | MinDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | MaxDate | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | IsDateDisabled | `Func<DateTime, bool>?` | `` | Custom predicate to disable specific dates (e.g. booked rooms, unavailable slots). Returns true for dates that should not be selectable. |
| DatePicker | DateClass | `Func<DateTime, string>?` | `` | Custom CSS classes per day cell (e.g. status backgrounds for booking calendars). |
| DatePicker | DateTooltip | `Func<DateTime, string?>?` | `` | Per-date tooltip text rendered as the day cell's title attribute (native browser tooltip). |
| DatePicker | DateBadge | `Func<DateTime, RenderFragment?>?` | `` | Per-date indicator slot (status dots, count badges, icons) rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell. |
| DatePicker | Presets | `List<DatePickerPreset>?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Mode | `DatePickerMode` | `DatePickerMode.Single` |  |
| DatePicker | RangeStart | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | RangeStartChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | RangeEnd | `DateOnly?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | RangeEndChanged | `EventCallback<DateOnly?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Values | `List<DateOnly>?` | `` | The selected days for Multiple. Clicking a day (or Enter/Space on it) toggles it in/out of the set; the popover stays open so several days can be picked in one session. Pair with ValuesChanged for two-way binding. |
| DatePicker | ValuesChanged | `EventCallback<List<DateOnly>?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | ShowTimePicker | `bool` | `false` |  |
| DatePicker | Time | `TimeSpan?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | TimeChanged | `EventCallback<TimeSpan?>` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | Disabled | `bool` | `false` |  |
| DatePicker | Clearable | `bool` | `false` |  |
| DatePicker | TriggerContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DatePicker | NumberOfMonths | `int` | `1` |  |
| DatePicker | AllowKeyboardInput | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), the trigger renders as a typeable \<input\> in the configured Format. On blur / Enter the buffer is parsed via DateOnly.TryParseExact(string, string, IFormatProvider, System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles, out DateOnly) (with a fallback to DateOnly.TryParse(string, IFormatProvider, System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles, out DateOnly)). On success the value commits via ValueChanged; on failure the buffer reverts and OnParseError fires. Set to false to keep the historic button-only trigger (input readonly). Has no effect for Range, Wheel, Inline, or when a custom TriggerContent is supplied. |
| DatePicker | OnParseError | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Fires when keyboard input cannot be parsed against the active Format (or culture short pattern), or parses to a date that is rejected by MinDate/MaxDate/IsDateDisabled. The argument is the offending raw buffer. |
| DatePicker | Inline | `bool` | `false` | Optional controlled-mode override for the popover open state. When non-null, the consumer holds the source of truth — the picker no longer mutates its internal state and instead raises OpenChanged. Use this when the picker lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active DataAnnotationsValidator) and the popover would otherwise close mid-click during a parameter cascade. When null (default), the picker falls back to its internal open state and behaves exactly as before. |
| DatePicker | FirstDayOfWeek | `DayOfWeek?` | `` | Leftmost column day of week. Null means culture default. |
| DatePicker | ShowWeekNumbers | `bool` | `false` | When true, renders an ISO week-number column. |

| DatePicker | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` | Fires whenever the popover would open or close. Pair with Open via @bind-Open for the controlled-mode pattern described above. |

| DatePicker | FullWidth | `bool` | `false` | When true, the date picker expands to fill its container width — equivalent to FullWidth on a Button. Propagates w-full to the Popover wrapper and PopoverTrigger so the constraint reaches the rendered trigger element through the shrink-wrap chain. |
| DatePicker | AutoFocus | `bool` | `false` | Focuses the date-picker trigger on first render. Whichever trigger element is rendered (button / range-button / masked input) receives the focus via its shared id. See Input.AutoFocus for the rationale. |

| DateRangePicker | DateTooltip | `Func<DateTime, string?>?` | `` | Per-date tooltip text rendered as the day cell's title. |
| DateRangePicker | DateBadge | `Func<DateTime, RenderFragment?>?` | `` | Per-date indicator slot rendered absolutely positioned in the bottom-right of the day cell. |
| DateRangePicker | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Format | `string?` | `` | Date format. When null (default) the inner DatePicker falls back to the effective culture's ShortDatePattern — so a de-DE user sees 15.03.2026 and an en-US user sees 3/15/2026 automatically. |
| DateRangePicker | Presets | `List<DateRangePreset>?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Disabled | `bool` | `false` |  |
| DateRangePicker | Clearable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| DateRangePicker | FullWidth | `bool` | `false` | When true, the date range picker expands to fill its container width. Forwarded directly to the inner DatePicker. |
| DateRangePicker | FirstDayOfWeek | `DayOfWeek?` | `` |  |
| DateRangePicker | ShowWeekNumbers | `bool` | `false` |  |

## Slots
- `TriggerContent` (DatePicker) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`)
- `DateTimeValueChanged` (`EventCallback<DateTime?>`)
- `RangeStartChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`)
- `RangeEndChanged` (`EventCallback<DateOnly?>`)
- `ValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<List<DateOnly>?>`)
- `TimeChanged` (`EventCallback<TimeSpan?>`)
- `OnParseError` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Fires when keyboard input cannot be parsed against the active Format (or culture short pattern), or parses to a date that is rejected by MinDate/MaxDate/IsDateDisabled. The argument is the offending raw buffer.
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`) — Fires whenever the popover would open or close. Pair with Open via @bind-Open for the controlled-mode pattern described above.

## Sub-components
- `DateRangePicker`, `DateWheelPicker`

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleInputKeyDown handles Enter in DatePicker.razor
- `Escape` — HandleInputKeyDown handles Escape in DatePicker.razor

## Example
```razor
<DatePicker />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/DatePicker/DatePicker.razor`
- `UI/DatePicker/DateRangePicker.razor`
- `UI/DatePicker/DateWheelPicker.razor`
